results.title: RBL Bank’s data centre to handle 5x current transaction volumes
results.description: RBL Bank has operationalized a new private-cloud-based primary data centre in Navi Mumbai, designed to boost transaction processing capacities by five times and support the bank’s digital growth for the next 10–12 years.

results.title: Missouri homebuilders report housing construction slump — but not in Kansas City
results.description: The housing industry saw a sharp drop in construction starts nationwide in May, both compared with the previous month and with the same period a year earlier. The broader Midwest region showed resilience, but Missouri builders still reported weaker business activity during this time. results.title: Business News | India's Kumaraguru College Wins Top Prize at Monaco Energy Boat Challenge
results.description: Get latest articles and stories on Business at LatestLY. India's Kumaraguru College of Technology claimed the biggest prize on offer at the 13th Monaco Energy Boat Challenge, the Prince Albert II of Monaco Foundation Sustainable Yachting Technology Award.
